topic: Claim your free Google Business Profile in 10 minutes

script.hook: Google is hiding your business right now.
beats: Go to Google and search your business name. If no profile shows, you are invisible.
Visit business.google.com and claim your free listing. Takes ten minutes, no website needed.
Add your hours, phone, and photos. Customers searching near you will finally find you.
script.cta: DM us SITE for a free review.
